title: Hasselt University protocol for maternal hemodynamic profiling
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1o8c0","text":"A maternal cardiovascular profile was assessed in every pregnant woman combining three non-invasive techniques to obtain information about arteries, veins, heart and body fluid content (Table 1). A standardized protocol was used as reported in previous studies, as enlisted below. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
